case_title: VONCEAL JOHNSON VS. AMELIA TRUMAN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUMAN, AMELIA

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-23-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-28-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. JUL-26-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, VONCEAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUMAN, AMELIA $2,644.60 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,644.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-02-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
